calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Oct-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for Personal Representative.

The Court questions why nothing has been filed. Mr. Vann stated that the reason the court has not received any filings from him is because he just learned about three weeks ago from his client that he went forward with distribution of the estate without a court order. Mr. Vann also stated that he believes his client distributed all of the estate, that he has not followed up with the beneficiaries (niece/client's sister) to see if they received their distributions, and that he can get receipts from them and to his knowledge, there are no assignments of interests. In addition, Mr. Vann stated that the personal representative sent him a check for his fees, and that he deposited the check into his attorney client trust account until the court approves his fees. The Court informed Mr. Vann that he needs to file a petition for final distribution and explain what happened, that he needs to attach receipts so that the court can ascertain that the amounts of distribution were correct and expressed that it is not happy with what happened. Mr. Vann may amend his petition. The First and Final Account. etc. is continued to October 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the amended petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, via ZOOM, for Aaron Alston, Personal Representative.

The court begins by asking counsel for a status of the accounting in this matter. Counsel reports that his client missed the appointment he had scheduled to visit banks to have funds moved. Counsel also reports that he went on vacation shortly thereafter and has not yet had an opportunity to contact his client.

The Accounting Petition is continued to August 23, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Quesada. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Jul-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, via ZOOM, counsel for Aaron Alston, Personal Representative.

Counsel at the outset advises the court that he has been ill which has caused the delays in moving this matter along. Counsel also reports that he plans to accompany his client this week to open bank accounts to comply with the court's request.

The Accounting Petition is continued to July 19, 2021 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is advised to respond to any Examiner's notes by July 9, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (474 La Grande Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Petitioner.

No overbids were placed. The Court sees good cause to shorten time on the 15-day notice period and notes that the sale was well publicized. The sale was confirmed at $950,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 7, 2020. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Bond is waived.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (474 La Grande Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann, Esq., counsel for Aaron Alston, personal representative. Shanna Chaney, granddaughter, is present via video conference.

The Court notes an error in the street address in the publication of Notice of Sale. After brief discussion, the Court continues the matter to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Vann is to re-notice the hearing.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
